headings.usage_rules: Use for all headings (H1-H4). For H1/H2, apply tracking-tight. Use italic lightly for elegant emphasis.

body.usage_rules: Use for body text, form inputs, buttons, and badges. Keep tracking normal. For meta-data/labels, use uppercase with tracking-widest.

layout_spacing.philosophy: Generous Spacing (p-8 to p-16) to create breathing room. The aesthetic relies heavily on negative space.
layout_spacing.bento_grid: Use asymmetrical grids for categories (e.g., span-1 and span-2 mixtures). Let plant images overlap the grid edges slightly.

buttons.hover_state: Slight scale (hover:scale-105) with opacity change. Do not rely solely on color shifts.

inputs.notes: Earthy, grounded inputs rather than harsh corporate boxes.

navigation.style: Glassmorphism header (backdrop-blur-xl bg-background/80) with a subtle bottom border.

features.whatsapp_button: Floating rounded-full button bottom-right. Fixed color: #25D366 (WhatsApp Green). Number: 087784841084
features.checkout: Must include manual bank transfer details and QRIS payment section. Requires file upload for payment proof.
features.admin_dashboard: Use strict grid hierarchy, compact spacing. Keep sidebar clean.

hero_backgrounds.description: Minimalist organic background, soft warm sunlight filtering through monstera leaves onto a textured stone wall
Abstract macro photography of a green leaf texture, soft lighting, organic curves

products_and_categories.description: Dining room with large windows overlooking autumn trees
green cactus plant on brown clay pot
White calla lilies in a vase with a ribbon
a large green leaf with drops of water on it
green plant on brown wooden table

instructions_to_main_agent: Inject fonts into index.css via standard @import or link tags.
Apply all HSL variables to global index.css as defined in colors.light.
Do not use default Shadcn standard aesthetic (banned: Inter font, full-screen gradients, rigid Vercel-look borders). Soften borders with 'border-border' and use nested radiuses.
Ensure the hero section highlights the product and emotion: Use the provided AI-generated textures (hero_backgrounds) mixed with the physical product images.
In the cart/checkout process, ensure the manual bank transfer instruction UI is extremely clear. Add an elegant file upload zone (Input type=file) specifically for 'Payment Proof' (Bukti Transfer).
Floating WhatsApp button is mandatory for conversions. Use pure HTML/Tailwind styling with a fixed position, bottom-6 right-6.
All interactive elements must have data-testid. E.g., data-testid='checkout-transfer-proof-upload'.
Admin dashboard should follow the 'Control Room' grid layout: Dense spacing, clean structure, functional and simple charts/lists.
